description: Assign a group name to faces. The command is applied to faces in the current < range >, if supplied, or to all faces if not. If the < remove > option is used, the faces in the range will be removed from the group s .

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Assign a group name to faces. The command is applied to faces in the current <range>, if supplied, or to all faces if not. If the <remove> option is used, the faces in the range will be removed from the group s.
